title: Release Notes
description: Draft release notes from change summaries.

prompts.name: draft_release_notes
prompts.title: Draft Release Notes
prompts.description: Convert raw changes into user-facing release notes.
prompts.template:
请根据下面的变更摘要生成面向用户的发布说明。分为新增、修复、已知限制和验证建议。必要时调用 demo MCP tool 生成发布前 checklist。

{{changes}}

arguments.name: changes
arguments.description: commit 摘要、PR 描述或变更列表。
